MINI MINUTES: Visiting Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: L. Fong; Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances on WED-JUL-13-2016:
Plaintiff St. Francis Square Cooperative, Inc. is represented by Donald Cryer;
Attorney Paul Raymond Perdue is present for the plaintiff.
Defendant Fatima Sullivan is present.
Attorney Christopher J. Carr appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants, and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case does NOT settle. The trial date of July 18, 2016 is continued to August 29, 2016 per stipulation and order filed July 13, 2016. (501)
